'''âsh-sh-t''' ('''kashashat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calendar|calendar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calendar|calendar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-sh-t
|-
! Lemma
| kashashat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishashat|thishashat]] || [[word:jishashat|jishashat]] || [[word:shishashat|shishashat]] || [[word:kishashat|kishashat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushashat|thuthushashat]] || [[word:jujushashat|jujushashat]] || [[word:shushushashat|shushushashat]] || [[word:kukushashat|kukushashat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushashat|thushashat]] || [[word:jushashat|jushashat]] || [[word:shushashat|shushashat]] || [[word:kushashat|kushashat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushashat|thushashat]] || [[word:jushashat|jushashat]] || [[word:shushashat|shushashat]] || [[word:kushashat|kushashat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshashat|theshashat]] || [[word:jeshashat|jeshashat]] || [[word:sheshashat|sheshashat]] || [[word:keshashat|keshashat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshashat|thothoshashat]] || [[word:jojoshashat|jojoshashat]] || [[word:shoshoshashat|shoshoshashat]] || [[word:kokoshashat|kokoshashat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshashat|thoshashat]] || [[word:joshashat|joshashat]] || [[word:shoshashat|shoshashat]] || [[word:koshashat|koshashat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshashat|thoshashat]] || [[word:joshashat|joshashat]] || [[word:shoshashat|shoshashat]] || [[word:koshashat|koshashat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshashat|thĂŠshashat]] || [[word:jĂŠshashat|jĂŠshashat]] || [[word:shĂŠshashat|shĂŠshashat]] || [[word:kĂŠshashat|kĂŠshashat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashashat|thathashashat]] || [[word:jajashashat|jajashashat]] || [[word:shashashashat|shashashashat]] || [[word:kakashashat|kakashashat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashashat|thashashat]] || [[word:jashashat|jashashat]] || [[word:shashashat|shashashat]] || [[word:kashashat|kashashat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashashat|thashashat]] || [[word:jashashat|jashashat]] || [[word:shashashat|shashashat]] || [[word:kashashat|kashashat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashashat|shashashat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashashat|goshashashat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashashat|gokishashashat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashashatnĂŒ|shashashatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashashatnknĂŒ|goshashashatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashashatnĂŒ|gokishashashatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashashatshĂ«|shashashatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashashatnkshĂ«|goshashashatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashashatshĂ«|gokishashashatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashashatro|shashashatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashashatnkro|goshashashatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashashatro|gokishashashatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashashatmu|shashashatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashashatnkmu|goshashashatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashashatmu|gokishashashatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashashatsher|shashashatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashashatnksher|goshashashatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashashatsher|gokishashashatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashashatng|shashashatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashashatnkng|goshashashatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashashatng|gokishashashatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashashatya|shashashatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashashatnkya|goshashashatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashashatya|gokishashashatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashashatyam|shashashatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashashatnkyam|goshashashatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashashatyam|gokishashashatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashashatnĂŒshĂ«|shashashatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashashatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashashatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashashatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashashatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashashatnĂŒro|shashashatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashashatnknĂŒro|goshashashatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashashatnĂŒro|gokishashashatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashashatnĂŒmu|shashashatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashashatnknĂŒmu|goshashashatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashashatnĂŒmu|gokishashashatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashashatshĂ«nĂŒ|shashashatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashashatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashashatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashashatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashashatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashashatshĂ«ro|shashashatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashashatnkshĂ«ro|goshashashatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashashatshĂ«ro|gokishashashatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashashatshĂ«mu|shashashatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashashatnkshĂ«mu|goshashashatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashashatshĂ«mu|gokishashashatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashashatronĂŒ|shashashatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashashatnkronĂŒ|goshashashatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashashatronĂŒ|gokishashashatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashashatroshĂ«|shashashatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashashatnkroshĂ«|goshashashatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashashatroshĂ«|gokishashashatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashashatromu|shashashatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashashatnkromu|goshashashatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashashatromu|gokishashashatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashashatmunĂŒ|shashashatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashashatnkmunĂŒ|goshashashatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashashatmunĂŒ|gokishashashatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashashatmushĂ«|shashashatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashashatnkmushĂ«|goshashashatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashashatmushĂ«|gokishashashatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashashatmuro|shashashatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashashatnkmuro|goshashashatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashashatmuro|gokishashashatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
